channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court expresses concerns over sect-based restrictions in Hindu temples
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has raised concerns regarding sect-based restrictions in temples and mutts, noting that such practices may adversely affect Hinduism and potentially divide society. A nine-j...

item.title: Super Eagles Players Ready for Europa League Quarter-final Between Porto and Nottingham Forest
item.description: FC Porto is set to face Nottingham Forest in the first leg of their UEFA Europa League quarter-final on April 9, 2026. This highly anticipated match brings together three Nigerian internationals, with...

item.title: Mpisane Issues Legal Demand Over Assault Claim by Influencer
item.description: Durban businessman Andile Mpisane, son of construction mogul Shauwn ‘MaMkhize’ Mkhize, has issued a formal letter of demand to influencer Inno Morolong, requesting an apology and retraction of allegat...

item.title: Gladu crosses floor to the Liberals, will support abortion rights
item.description: Marilyn Gladu, a former Conservative MP, has crossed the floor to join the Liberal Party, making her the latest to join Prime Minister Mark Carney’s caucus. While her social conservative views sparked...

item.title: How the Ukulele Rekindled My Love for Music and Brought Joy into My Life
item.description: Melanie Tait shares how a chance encounter at a house-warming party led her to rediscover her love for music through the ukulele. Initially invited to bring a performance, Tait found herself singing a...

item.title: DepEd Implements 4-Day Workweek Amid Energy Crisis
item.description: To address rising electricity costs due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East and the declaration of a national energy emergency, the Department of Education (DepEd) will be implementing a four-d...

item.title: Ezekiel Izuogu and the Z-600: Nigeria's First Indigenous Car Prototype
item.description: Na this one na real pioneer story wey many Nigerians never sabi. Back in 1997, one engineer wey im name na Ezekiel Izuogu build the first car wey dem make from scratch for Nigeria, the Z-600. No be as...

item.title: Paris Jackson raises concerns over handling of Michael Jackson's estate by executors
item.description: Paris Jackson has accused the executors of her late father Michael Jackson's estate of using estate funds to publicly disparage her amid ongoing legal disputes. At 28, she, along with her brothers Pri...

item.title: Ethics in Kenya's Industry: A Key to Sustainable Growth
item.description: Integrity is often highlighted in mission statements and policies across Kenya's corporate and public sectors, but in practice, it remains a challenge to define and implement. As issues like accountab...

item.title: IMF warns of prolonged diesel and jet fuel shortages
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a warning about the potential long-term shortage of diesel and jet fuel. Due to various factors, including geopolitical tensions and supply chain disru...

item.title: DA to hold largest federal congress with over 2,000 delegates
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) is preparing to host its largest federal congress to date, bringing together more than 2,000 delegates from across South Africa and even a small number from the party's ov...

item.title: Minister Adelabu Highlights Progress in Nigeria Power Sector Reforms Under Tinubu Administration
item.description: Minister of Power, Adebayo Adelabu, don talk say the power sector reforms wey President Bola Ahmed Tinubu administration dey do dey yield results. Him highlight the highest electricity generation leve...

item.title: Stronach defence alleges Crown coaching of complainants in sexual assault trial
item.description: In the ongoing sexual assault trial of Canadian businessman Frank Stronach, his defence lawyer, Leora Shemesh, has claimed that some complainants were coached by Crown prosecutors before giving testim...

item.title: Trump warns of catastrophic consequences for Iran if deadline passes
item.description: US President Donald Trump has issued another stark warning to Iran, threatening devastating consequences if the country does not end its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz by the deadline of 8pm Tuesday...

item.title: UNIJOS Confirms Two Students Dead, Three Injured Amid Jos Violence
item.description: The University of Jos (UNIJOS) don confirm say two of their students don die because of recent wahala wey happen for Jos, while three other people – two students and one staff – still dey hospital dey...

item.title: BMW India Plans 23 New Product Launches in 2026 to Maintain Growth
item.description: BMW India is on track to continue its record-breaking performance with plans for an extensive lineup in 2026. After posting its highest-ever Q1 sales in India, the luxury automaker aims to launch 23 n...

item.title: ODM Condemns Assault on Vihiga Senator, Urges Immediate Investigation
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) has strongly condemned the physical attack on Vihiga Senator Godfrey Osotsi, calling it unacceptable and demanding prompt investigation. ODM party leader Oburu Odi...

item.title: Man seeks advice on managing Sh10 million debt without selling family home
item.description: A man in his late 40s, married with five children, is facing severe financial strain with debts totaling Sh10 million, including Sh7 million owed to friends and Sh3 million to a bank. He accumulated t...

item.title: Rubicon Communications CEO to Repay NSF Funds after Failing to Deliver Training Programme
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has secured an Acknowledgement of Debt from Rubicon Communications CC and its CEO, Hangwani Mudangawe Nengovhela, after the company misused nearly R2.7 million all...

item.title: Uttarakhand CM Pushkar Singh Dhami Reviews Char Dham Yatra 2026 Preparations and Safety Measures
item.description: Uttarakhand Chief Minister Pushkar Singh Dhami held a detailed review meeting at the Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Auditorium in Vishwakarma Bhawan to evaluate preparations for the upcoming Char Dham Ya...
